canonical_definition: The first Greek financial evaluation benchmark, assessing LLMs across six tasks: numeric NER, textual NER, question answering, extractive summarization, abstractive summarization, and topic classification using expert-annotated Greek financial datasets.
papers: Model Consistency as a Cheap yet Predictive Proxy forLLMElo Scores

definitions.text: The first Greek financial evaluation benchmark, assessing LLMs across six tasks: numeric NER, textual NER, question answering, extractive summarization, abstractive summarization, and topic classification using expert-annotated Greek financial datasets.
definitions.paper: Model Consistency as a Cheap yet Predictive Proxy forLLMElo Scores

definitions.text: A benchmark for evaluating large language models on financial question answering and sentiment analysis in Greek, designed to assess performance in low-resource financial language settings.

characterization: The first Greek financial evaluation benchmark, assessing LLMs across six tasks: numeric NER, textual NER, question answering, extractive summarization, abstractive summarization, and topic classification using expert-annotated Greek financial datasets.

emnlp25: Model Consistency as a Cheap yet Predictive Proxy forLLMElo Scores
